zh.lifeSummary: 當John Miller於1543年1月出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同時，他的父親John Miller29歲，母親Katherine Anne Wolley27歲。他於1553年10月20日與Anne Winterhay在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克聖 尼拉希也 邱奇結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1595年1月1日在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Miller于1543年1月出生在英国英格兰多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同时，他的父亲John Miller29岁，母亲Katherine Anne Wolley27岁。他于1553年10月20日与Anne Winterhay在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克聖 尼拉希也 邱奇结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1595年1月1日在英国英格兰多瑟特享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Miller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a miller. The standard modern vocabulary word represents the northern Middle English term miller, an agent derivative of mille ‘mill’, reinforced by Old Norse mylnari (see Milner ). In southern, western, and central England Millward (literally, ‘mill keeper’) was the usual term. In North America, the surname Miller has absorbed many cognate surnames from other languages, for example German Müller (see Mueller ), Dutch Mulder and Molenaar , French Meunier , Italian Molinaro , Spanish Molinero , Hungarian Molnár (see Molnar ), Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Mlinar , Polish Młynarz or Młynarczyk (see Mlynarczyk ). Miller (including in the senses below) is the seventh most frequent surname in the US.

South German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Müller ‘miller’ (see Mueller ) and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in other European countries, notably in Poland, Denmark, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), and Czechia; compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Croatian, Serbian, and Slovenian   Miler   ‘miller’, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Millar
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Miller  . It is also found in Ireland (especially Antrim).

variants.name: Mueller
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Klaus, Heinz, Helmut, Wolfgang, Manfred, Horst.

German (mainly Müller) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Müller); Dutch: occupational name for a miller, Middle High German müller, German Müller. In Germany, Müller, Mueller is the most frequent of all surnames; in the US it is often changed to Miller or appears as Muller . See also Mulder .

variants.name: Milner
meanings: English (northern, especially Yorkshire): variant of Miller , retaining the -n- of the Middle English word milnere ‘miller’.

variants.name: Millward
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): occupational name from Middle English milne-ward, mille-ward ‘keeper of a mill, miller’ (Old English mylen-weard). In southern England and the West Midlands this was a standard medieval term for a miller. Compare Miller .

variants.name: McMiller
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from the occupational byname   Miller  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Miller was born in January 1543, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Miller, was 29 and his mother, Katherine Anne Wolley, was 27. He married Anne Winterhay on 20 October 1553, in St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 January 1595, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

Il a épousé Anne Winterhay le 20 octobre 1553, à St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1595, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Millerが1543年1月にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンで生まれた時，父John Millerは29歳，母Katherine Anne Wolleyは27歳であった。1553年10月20日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックスト ニチオラス' チャーチでAnne Winterhayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1595年1月1日にイギリスイギリスドールセトで52歳で死去した。

ko.St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshi: 영국 워윅실르 워윅 스트 닉홀아스' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Miller(이)가 1543년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Miller(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Anne Wolley(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1553년 10월 20일 영국 워윅실르 워윅 스트 닉홀아스' 처르치에서 Anne Winterhay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1595년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshi: ст ничолас' чурч, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Miller родился январь 1543 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Miller было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Anne Wolley, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Winterhay 20 октября 1553 г. в местности ст ничолас' чурч, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 января 1595 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Anne Winterhay el 20 de octubre de 1553, en St Nicholas' Church, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas.
